title: Quality of Byte
description: A pack of optimizations, quality of life and immersive mods that improve gameplay without departing from the vanilla experience.
body:
### About
Quality of Byte is a light pack of performance optimizations, quality of life improvements, resource packs, fixes and power user mods, designed to improve Minecraft's feel without departing far from the vanilla experience.

### Vanilla Compatible
Almost all included mods are entirely client-side, and those that are not do not effect the server side in any way that makes it incompatible with vanilla clients!

### Join The Discord
The Discord is where I maintain all bug reports and update requests. Also known to be a nice place to chill.
